_comment: Art-directed homely imagery for the landing. name -> gen-<name>.png in assets/media-work; build-media.sh maps it to the matching public/media triplet. 'gap' = we don't have this shot yet (generate first). 'use_bottle' = edit the real Organikaly bottle in. Regenerating a 'refresh' slot replaces the current placeholder with a cohesive shoot. STYLE suffix is added by gen-images.py.

images.name: compare-coldpressed
images.prompt: A tall clear glass bottle of rich golden-amber cold-pressed yellow mustard oil on a warm cream surface, a few whole yellow mustard seeds scattered beside it, the oil glowing in soft morning light. Fresh, pure, premium, inviting. Single hero bottle, generous negative space above.

images.name: compare-refined
images.prompt: A plain generic pale, thin, almost colourless refined cooking oil in a nondescript clear plastic bottle on a flat neutral grey surface under cool even light. Ordinary, industrial, characterless, a little dull. No brand, no label text. Understated, honest, not exaggerated or scary.

images.name: bottle-hero
images.prompt: Place this exact Organikaly mustard oil bottle upright on a warm cream handloom cloth on a wooden table, soft window light from the left, a small brass bowl of yellow mustard seeds beside it, a sprig of mustard flowers. Keep the bottle and its label exactly as given. Cozy home-kitchen still life, generous space above the bottle.

images.name: pour
images.prompt: A ribbon of golden mustard oil pouring from a steel spoon into a hot black kadhai for a tadka, tiny cumin seeds crackling, warm steam, close and appetising. Portrait orientation, the pour as the hero.

images.name: kitchen
images.prompt: A lived-in Indian home kitchen counter at morning: a glass bottle of golden mustard oil, a wooden board with chopped vegetables, a steel tadka pan, cream linen, brass. Warm, homely, real, gently cluttered with care.

images.name: thali
images.prompt: A simple home-cooked Indian thali on a brass plate, sabzi and dal tempered in golden mustard oil, a wooden table, cream cloth, warm light. Honest home food, not a restaurant styling.

images.name: tadka
images.prompt: Close-up of a tadka blooming in golden mustard oil in a small steel kadhai, mustard seeds popping, curry leaves, warm glow. Appetising, homely, alive.

images.name: heritage-hands
images.prompt: Two weathered hands of an older Indian person gently holding out a glass bottle of golden mustard oil toward the viewer, over a mustard field softly blurred behind, golden hour. Warmth, trust, heritage. Face not shown.

images.name: seed-macro
images.prompt: Extreme macro of whole yellow mustard seeds in a small heap, each round seed catching soft golden light, a few in sharp focus and the rest melting into bokeh. Square, tactile, rich.

images.name: field
images.prompt: A yellow mustard field in full bloom at golden hour under a soft sky, rows receding to the horizon, gentle warm haze. Wide, calm, heritage. Landscape 16:9.

images.name: step-grown
images.prompt: Hands cupping cleaned yellow mustard seeds over a jute sack in a bright barn, sorted and clean. Step one of a process story.

images.name: step-pressed
images.prompt: A traditional wooden kachi ghani cold-press turning, golden mustard oil beginning to run out, warm workshop light, no machinery gloss. Step two of a process story.

images.name: step-bottled
images.prompt: Fresh golden mustard oil being filled into a clear glass bottle straight from the press, a hand-stamped press date visible on a small kraft label, clean and honest. Step three of a process story.

images.name: step-kitchen
images.prompt: The finished golden mustard oil bottle at home on a sunlit kitchen shelf beside brass and terracotta, arrived and at rest. Step four of a process story.

images.name: journey-art
images.style: Flat vector storybook illustration, soft pastel palette of sage green, golden mustard-yellow and cream, gentle gradients, clean rounded friendly shapes, decorative and homely Indian countryside, no photorealism, no text, no words, no logos, no watermark. A uniform warm cream (#F3F1E7) background that blends seamlessly into a cream webpage; leave generous empty cream space.
images.prompt: A tall vertical decorative panel composed in three horizontal bands on a uniform warm cream background. TOP BAND (top third): a large leafy tree branch reaching in from the top-left corner with several small colourful songbirds perched along it, a few soft blossoms, and a pale golden sun to the right. MIDDLE BAND (middle third): COMPLETELY EMPTY warm cream, no elements at all, calm open space reserved for a title, at most a barely-visible faint pale line-drawing of low hills. BOTTOM BAND (bottom third): a gentle rolling green-and-gold blooming mustard field with a small farmhouse on the left and a white humped Indian cow beside it and a low wooden fence. Homely, premium, storybook.

images.name: benefit-1
images.prompt: A small round still-life: a little heap of golden yellow mustard seeds with a single glistening drop of golden oil, on cream linen, soft light. Tight square vignette.

images.name: benefit-2
images.prompt: A small round still-life: a tiny brass bowl of golden mustard oil beside fresh green mustard leaves and a sprig of mustard flowers, on cream linen, soft light. Tight square vignette.

images.name: benefit-3
images.prompt: A small round still-life: a close detail of a traditional wooden kachi ghani cold-press with golden oil beading, warm workshop light. Tight square vignette.

images.name: benefit-4
images.prompt: A small round still-life: yellow mustard flowers and a few whole seeds cupped in soil-dusted fingertips over a field, golden hour. Tight square vignette.

images.name: quiz-portrait
images.prompt: A warm, festive Indian home scene: a smiling middle-aged woman in a saree at a wooden table with two bottles of golden cold-pressed mustard oil, lit diyas, marigold flowers and brass vessels around her, soft glowing evening light. Inviting and homely. Portrait composition, the bottles clearly in frame.

images.name: stamp-oil
images.style: The product bottle rendered cleanly and realistically, set into a flat pastel storybook illustration of a blooming green-and-gold mustard field with a small farmhouse and soft blue sky. Decorative, homely, framed with breathing room. No text or logos other than what is on the product, no watermark.
images.prompt: Place this exact Organikaly mustard oil bottle standing in the foreground of the illustrated field scene, as the hero of a collectible postage-stamp style product card. Keep the bottle and its label exactly as given.

images.name: stamp-dals
images.style: Flat pastel storybook illustration blended with a realistic product, sage green and golden palette, small farmhouse and field, decorative and homely, no text, no logos, no watermark.
images.prompt: A collectible postage-stamp style product card: an open jute sack of assorted organic dals and pulses in the foreground of an illustrated green field with a farmhouse. Warm and wholesome.

images.name: stamp-khand
images.style: Flat pastel storybook illustration blended with a realistic product, sage green and golden palette, small farmhouse and sugarcane, decorative and homely, no text, no logos, no watermark.
images.prompt: A collectible postage-stamp style product card: a bowl and a small heap of golden unrefined khand (jaggery sugar) in the foreground of an illustrated field with sugarcane and a farmhouse. Warm and wholesome.

images.name: stamp-pantry
images.style: Flat pastel storybook illustration blended with realistic products, sage green and golden palette, small farmhouse and field, decorative and homely, no text, no logos, no watermark.
images.prompt: A collectible postage-stamp style product card: a small still-life of assorted organic pantry staples (grains, spices, a jar) in the foreground of an illustrated green field with a farmhouse. Warm and wholesome.

images.name: shop-oil
images.prompt: Place this exact Organikaly mustard oil bottle as a clean product shot on a warm cream linen surface with a few whole mustard seeds and a soft blurred kitchen behind, gentle callout space around it. Keep the bottle and label exactly as given. Square composition.

images.name: shop-dals
images.prompt: A clean product-style shot of organic dals and pulses in a glass jar and a small bowl on warm cream linen with a soft blurred kitchen behind, gentle space around. Square composition.

images.name: shop-khand
images.prompt: A clean product-style shot of golden unrefined khand (jaggery sugar) in a glass jar and a small bowl on warm cream linen with a soft blurred kitchen behind, gentle space around. Square composition.

images.name: shop-pantry
images.prompt: A clean product-style shot of assorted organic pantry staples in jars on warm cream linen with a soft blurred kitchen behind, gentle space around. Square composition.

images.name: ghar-line
images.style: Very light single-colour line drawing (thin sage-green lines on plain cream), minimal, sparse, decorative watermark art, lots of empty space, no fill, no text, no logo, no watermark label.
images.prompt: A faint minimal line-art of a small Indian village house, a mustard plant and a wooden oil press, sparse and delicate, meant to sit at low opacity behind a section.

images.name: proof-date
images.prompt: Place this exact Organikaly mustard oil bottle in a warm, intimate close-up on cream linen, tied with a small kraft-paper batch tag on twine, a few whole yellow mustard seeds scattered beside it, soft morning light. The feeling is freshness and honesty, a just-pressed small batch. Keep the bottle and its label exactly as given; the little tag can look hand-stamped but leave any date soft and unreadable. Landscape composition with the bottle to one side and gentle space.

images.name: story
images.prompt: A warm, homely portrait: two weathered older hands and a younger hand together cradling a tall glass bottle of golden cold-pressed mustard oil, a softly blurred sunlit blooming mustard field and a small farmhouse behind, golden-hour light, a few loose yellow mustard seeds. Tender, trustworthy, heritage, food made with care and passed down. Faces not shown. Photorealistic, cream and golden tones, portrait composition.

images.name: recipe-tadka-dal
images.prompt: A rustic brass handi of golden yellow toor dal, a small iron tadka ladle of sizzling mustard oil with cumin-dark spices and a dried red chilli being poured over it, oil shimmering, a few coriander leaves. Steam rising softly. Homely Indian dal tadka moment, warm and appetising.

images.name: recipe-aloo-sabzi
images.prompt: A well-worn iron kadhai of golden turmeric-stained aloo sabzi, potato cubes glistening with mustard oil, scattered coriander, a roti folded at the side on a terracotta plate. Rustic North-Indian home lunch, warm and generous.

images.name: recipe-atta-halwa
images.prompt: A small brass bowl heaped with dark golden-brown atta halwa glistening with ghee, garnished with a few sliced almonds, a piece of jaggery and a vintage spoon beside it on cream linen. Festive yet homely Indian sweet, rich and warm.

images.name: recipe-cheela
images.prompt: Two golden moong-dal cheelas (savoury Indian lentil pancakes) folded on a terracotta plate, flecked with green chilli and coriander, a small steel bowl of green chutney beside them, a light drizzle of oil sheen. Fresh homely Indian breakfast.

images.name: recipe-kachumber
images.prompt: A bright fresh kachumber salad of diced cucumber, tomato and red onion in a hammered brass bowl, glistening lightly with golden mustard-oil dressing, scattered coriander, a lemon half beside it. Crisp, fresh, homely Indian side salad.

images.name: recipe-haldi-doodh
images.prompt: A warm golden glass of haldi doodh (turmeric milk) on a small brass tray, gentle steam rising, a small piece of jaggery and a pinch of turmeric powder in a tiny wooden pinch-bowl beside it, evening window light. Calm, comforting Indian bedtime drink.

images._group: Store app — icon / adaptive / splash (destination: organikally-store-app/assets/, staged in .scheduled-build/media-out/)
images.name: app-icon
images.style: Flat minimal vector app-icon logo mark, bold and iconic, clean geometric shapes, no photorealism, deep forest-green (#1B5E20) and warm mustard-gold (#F0B61A) and cream (#FAFAF7) only, crisp edges, perfectly centred symmetric emblem with generous even padding, no text, no words, no letters, no watermark.
images.prompt: A single iconic brand mark for a premium organic Indian food brand, centred in the frame: a stylised golden mustard blossom whose soft petals also read as a single falling drop of golden oil, resting just above a simple curved green leaf, set on a deep forest-green rounded-square field. Simple, memorable, premium, symmetrical, lots of even margin all around.

images.name: app-adaptive-fg
images.style: Flat minimal vector logo mark, no photorealism, mustard-gold (#F0B61A) and cream on a solid deep forest-green (#1B5E20) field, the mark small and perfectly centred within the middle 60 percent of the frame with very wide even margins so it survives a circular mask, no text, no words, no letters, no watermark.
images.prompt: The Organikaly brand mark — a stylised golden mustard blossom that also reads as a falling drop of golden oil above a simple curved green leaf — small and perfectly centred with wide empty margins on all sides, on a solid deep forest-green field. Android adaptive-icon foreground.

images.name: app-splash
images.style: Calm premium brand splash graphic, flat, a solid deep forest-green (#0E3B14) filling the whole frame edge to edge, a single centred emblem in mustard-gold (#F0B61A) and cream with a great deal of empty breathing space around it, subtle tiny faint mustard-flower motifs only in the far corners, no text, no words, no letters, no watermark.
images.prompt: The Organikaly emblem — a golden mustard blossom and oil-drop mark above a small green leaf — centred in mustard-gold and cream with a great deal of empty deep forest-green space around it, a few tiny faint scattered mustard petals softly in the far corners. Serene, premium, welcoming launch screen on a deep forest-green ground.

images._group: Store app — onboarding illustrations (destination: organikally-store-app/assets/, staged)
images.name: onboard-farm
images.style: Warm editorial flat illustration, soft pastel palette of forest and sage green, golden mustard-yellow and warm cream, gentle gradients, clean rounded friendly shapes, homely Indian farm-to-home storytelling, premium organic brand feel, no photorealism, no text, no words, no logos, no watermark. Warm cream sky filling the upper area for a headline.
images.prompt: A sunlit yellow mustard field in full bloom at golden hour, a farmer gently harvesting into a basket, a small farmhouse, a leafy tree with a couple of small songbirds, rolling green-and-gold land. Homely, hopeful, farm-to-home. Generous empty cream sky above for onboarding text.

images.name: onboard-press
images.style: Warm editorial flat illustration, soft pastel palette of forest and sage green, golden mustard-yellow and warm cream, gentle gradients, clean rounded friendly shapes, homely and honest, no photorealism, no text, no words, no logos, no watermark. Generous empty cream space above for a headline.
images.prompt: A traditional wooden kachi ghani cold-press slowly turning, a ribbon of golden mustard oil running out into a clay pot, whole yellow mustard seeds and a few blossoms nearby, cosy workshop warmth. Honest craft, cold-pressed. Generous empty cream space above for onboarding text.

images.name: onboard-delivery
images.style: Warm editorial flat illustration, soft pastel palette of forest and sage green, golden mustard-yellow and warm cream, gentle gradients, clean rounded friendly shapes, cheerful and welcoming, no photorealism, no text, no words, no logos, no watermark. Generous empty cream space above for a headline.
images.prompt: A cheerful home-delivery moment: a friendly delivery rider handing a parcel of bottles and pantry goods at a welcoming Indian home doorway with a potted mustard plant and a warm doormat. Warm, trustworthy, farm-to-door. Generous empty cream space above for onboarding text.

images._group: Store app — category tiles (destination: organikally-store-app/assets/, staged)
images.name: category-oils
images.style: Clean flat storybook still-life on a warm cream background, forest-green and mustard-gold and cream palette, the product clearly the hero, soft simple shapes, a soft simple illustrated mustard-field motif behind, decorative and premium, square composition with even padding, no text, no words, no logos, no watermark other than what is on the product.
images.prompt: Place this exact Organikaly mustard oil bottle as the clear hero of a clean square category tile, standing on warm cream with a few whole yellow mustard seeds beside it. Keep the bottle and its label exactly as given. Even padding, premium, tidy.

images.name: category-pulses
images.style: Clean flat storybook still-life on a warm cream background, forest-green and mustard-gold and cream palette, the product clearly the hero, soft simple shapes, a soft simple illustrated field motif behind, decorative and premium, square composition with even padding, no text, no words, no logos, no watermark.
images.prompt: A clean square category tile: an open jute sack and a small bowl of assorted organic dals and pulses as the hero on warm cream. Wholesome, premium, tidy. Even padding.

images.name: category-sweeteners
images.style: Clean flat storybook still-life on a warm cream background, forest-green and mustard-gold and cream palette, the product clearly the hero, soft simple shapes, a soft simple illustrated sugarcane-field motif behind, decorative and premium, square composition with even padding, no text, no words, no logos, no watermark.
images.prompt: A clean square category tile: a small heap and a bowl of golden unrefined khand (jaggery sugar) as the hero on warm cream, a few sugarcane leaves. Wholesome, premium, tidy. Even padding.

images.name: club-hero
images.prompt: A warm premium overhead flat-lay of a curated organic pantry gift set on cream handloom linen: a tall clear glass bottle of golden cold-pressed mustard oil with a bare unmarked glass surface, small natural cloth drawstring pouches of dals, a clear glass jar of golden jaggery, a scatter of whole yellow mustard seeds and a sprig of yellow mustard blossom, gathered with a simple undyed kraft ribbon. Clean, plain, unbranded surfaces. Inviting, generous, premium. Wide landscape composition with calm empty cream space on the left for a headline.

images.name: benefit-delivery
images.style: Flat minimal illustrated emblem inside a soft rounded medallion, single centred motif, deep forest-green and mustard-gold on warm cream, clean line-and-fill vector style, iconic and friendly, generous even padding, square, no text, no words, no numbers, no letters, no watermark.
images.prompt: A friendly emblem of free home delivery: a simple parcel box with a small mustard-leaf sprig and a gentle motion swoosh, centred in a soft rounded medallion.

images.name: benefit-savings
images.style: Flat minimal illustrated emblem inside a soft rounded medallion, single centred motif, deep forest-green and mustard-gold on warm cream, clean line-and-fill vector style, iconic and friendly, generous even padding, square, no text, no words, no numbers, no letters, no watermark.
images.prompt: A friendly emblem of member savings: a simple price tag with a small downward arrow and a tiny mustard blossom, centred in a soft rounded medallion. No numbers, no letters.

images.name: benefit-coins
images.style: Flat minimal illustrated emblem inside a soft rounded medallion, single centred motif, deep forest-green and mustard-gold on warm cream, clean line-and-fill vector style, iconic and friendly, generous even padding, square, no text, no words, no numbers, no letters, no watermark.
images.prompt: A friendly emblem of reward coins: a small neat stack of round golden coins, each marked with a tiny mustard-flower motif, centred in a soft rounded medallion. No numbers, no letters.

images.name: benefit-access
images.style: Flat minimal illustrated emblem inside a soft rounded medallion, single centred motif, deep forest-green and mustard-gold on warm cream, clean line-and-fill vector style, iconic and friendly, generous even padding, square, no text, no words, no numbers, no letters, no watermark.
images.prompt: A friendly emblem of early access: a simple key crossed with a small clock and a tiny mustard blossom, centred in a soft rounded medallion, suggesting members get in first.

images.name: lifestyle-kitchen
images.prompt: A warm, lived-in Indian home kitchen morning scene: a tall glass bottle of golden Organikaly mustard oil and a few pantry staples on a wooden counter with cream linen and brass, soft window light, a simple tadka cooking in a steel pan softly blurred behind. Homely, real, premium. Landscape composition with gentle space.

images.name: lifestyle-table
images.prompt: A warm home dining moment: a simple home-cooked Indian meal on a wooden table, sabzi and dal tempered in golden mustard oil, cream cloth and brass vessels, gentle steam, soft morning light, a welcoming family-table feeling. Honest home food, not restaurant styling. Landscape composition with gentle space.
